sampleViolations.taskName: Align Milestone 2 status with child-task truth model (no `planned` milestone with all critical children `done` unless explicitly deferred lane)
Reclassify over-claimed document tasks from `done` to `partial/planned` when canonical document witnesses are missing
Split document-adapter completion semantics into explicit lanes: `schema/plumbing complete` vs `canonical materialization complete`
Capture baseline query snapshot pack for before/after comparability (`DocumentWitness` count, claim-to-witness support count, document-project count)
Persist witness classes for canonical lane (`DocumentCollection`, `DocumentNode`, paragraph/entity equivalents) with stable identity fields
Materialize canonical document-layer graph witnesses under proper project taxonomy (`Project.projectType='document'`)
Define canonical witness identity/upsert rule: `witnessId = sha256(normalizedContent)`; `sourcePath` metadata-only unless policy requires source-distinct witnesses
Define canonical witness node shape `DocumentWitness` with fields: `sourceType`, `sourcePath`, `contentHash`, `extractionTimestamp`
Promote invariant from advisory to fail-closed after DL-2 witness materialization proves stable
Add invariant exception policy only for explicitly marked IR-shadow tasks with expiry + ticket reference

Add machine-checkable invariant (advisory mode first): any `done` document-materialization task requires (a) at least one `Project.projectType='document'` and (b) canonical document witness nodes present
Add project identity contract check: document ingestion outputs must not register as `projectType='code'`
Add migration/reclassification procedure for IR-only document outputs to canonical document project or mark explicitly as shadow lane
Audit and resolve document-like nodes currently stored under non-document derived project namespaces
Surface wording status in verification status dashboard outputs
Add forbidden wording rule: block "document layer complete" phrasing when canonical witness invariant is red
Add pitch-safe wording contract: allowed claim = "document adapter plumbing + IR ingestion proven" until DL-2 witness criteria pass
Add post-ingest dependency density check for scoped milestones and surface in `plan:deps:verify`
Add explicit exception tag policy (`NO_DEPENDS_OK`) with required reason + expiry
Add parser/verifier rule: fail when scoped milestones (`DL-*`, `GM-*`) contain missing dependency wiring
